report.summary: Quiet cycle — only standup ran this hour; no new build/publish/design activity since v5 at 13:06 UTC prior run.

sections.title: Analytics
items: No new traffic data ingested this cycle; delta vs v5 standup is flat.
Top pages unchanged from prior cycle (DCA calculator, restaking guide, wallet compare holding lead positions).
Search Console: no new queries breaking into top-10 since last run — monitoring restaking + RWA clusters.
No regression signals in bounce/engagement — stable.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Carry-over: build cycle last ran 04:20 UTC — gap of ~8h, worth flagging if intentional.
Publish ran once today (08:31); queue status unchanged since.
EOD QA ran 08:52 — clean, no blockers logged.
Open blocker: none reported in reports/ folder this cycle.
Planned vs done last cycle: standup v5 planned a light monitor pass — executed as planned.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1. Re-trigger degen-build-cycle — 8h gap is too long; we're burning standup cycles without shipping.
2. Check publish queue depth — if build has been idle, queue may be drying up.
3. Strategic flag: evaluate whether hourly standup cadence is warranted on low-activity days, or throttle to every 2–3h.
